title: Vitest integration
excerpt: description: Run unit and integration tests for Cloudflare Workers inside the Workers runtime using the Vitest integration. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. For most users, Cloudflare recommends using the Workers Vitest integration for testing Workers and [Pages Functions](https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/functions/) projects. [Vitest ↗](https://vitest.dev/) is a popular JavaScript testing framework featuring a very fast watch mode, Jest compatibility, and out-of-the-box support for TypeScript.…
